title: Tinkers' Gears
description: [TConstruct & Create]Add some fancy linkage for two mods
body:
# Tinkers' Gears

Greetings, Engineers and Tinkers!  
Welcome to the world of Tinkers' Gears!  

## Reminder
This mod is currently being split and not yet completed.  
You can try [Engineers Materials](https://modrinth.com/mod/engineers-materials) and [Tinkers' Ponder](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-ponder) first.

## Introduction
Tinkers' Gears is a dedicated cross-mod tailored for Create and Tinkers' Construct 3,with the goal of creating unique, innovative content that bridges these two mods.  
Currently, the mod is still in the Early Preview phase—some content remains unfinished and unpolished, but it still offers a solid level of playability.  
This mod is open-source under the MIT License, allowing modification, secondary development, and free inclusion in modpacks.  

## Content Overview
- Cobalt Casing Series: Upgraded machinery for artisans, featuring reduced stress, faster operation speed, and exclusive special effects (including Silk Touch Drill, Fortune Drill, and Redstone Control).
- Tinker Casing Series: Currently unfinished (stay tuned for updates!).
- New TiC Materials & Traits: Rose Quartz, Cardboard, Brass and Andesite Alloy. 
- New TiC Modifiers: Auto-Crushing, Polishing, Engineer's Goggles, Diving Weights, Engineer's Manipulator Arm, and more.
- Recipe Compatibility:
  - Ore Multiplier Smelting for crushed ores;
  - Dough Mixing Recipes for three types of Slimeballs in TiC;
  - Alloy Mixing Recipes (compatible with Metallurgy);
  - Smelting Recipes for components and small items in Create;
  - Industrial Production Line Recipes for components (compatible with Sturdy Mixer);
  - And many more! (Too numerous to list—we recommend experiencing them firsthand!)
- Ingenious Compatibility:
  - Enables the Burner to support Melters and Alloyers;
  - Allows the Fan to adjust the cooling speed of Casting (supports Create: Henry);
- Goggles Enhancement: Lets players view key information for certain blocks in Tinkers' Construct (including recipe outputs, crafting progress, and contents).
- Content Completion: Adds Crushed Cobalt Ore, Cobalt Plate, Blaze Chocolate, and related items (compatible with Create: Liquid Fuels).
- Original Object: Blazing Chocolate, Soul Cardboard and so on.
